name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A little something from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We saw you cancelled your plan with us — no worries at all, life gets busy and dental care shouldn't add to the stress. We just wanted to reach out (no pressure, promise) and leave the door open.

If you ever want to come back for a cleaning or a check-in, here's 20% off on us:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days at checkout. Our goal has always been to make dental care feel less scary, and that offer stands whether you use the code or not.

And if something about your visit (or the pricing, or the scheduling, or anything else) didn't sit right — I'd genuinely love to hear it. Just hit reply. A real person reads every message.

Take care of yourself,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — quick heads up your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in a few days. Use it whenever you're ready, no pressure. :)

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
